workflow: Canva or photo-editing exports for researched-3d-subject realism layers
exportGuidance: Use transparent PNG/WebP for cut-out subjects when available.
Use 2x or 4k exports for hero reference cards.
Keep one front view, one side/detail crop, and optional night/texture variants.
Place exported files under public/media/canva/ and reference them from scene.realismImages or scene.canvaAssets.exports.
Record every third-party media source, author, license, and modification note in public/media/ATTRIBUTION.md.
